message:
fix(fr-command): INFO stats emits 12 missing upstream fields [bd-frankenredis-infostats]

Adds upstream Redis 7.2 server.c::genRedisInfoString stats fields
that fr was not emitting:

  + pubsubshard_channels (legacy alias of pubsub_shardchannels)
  + total_active_defrag_time
  + total_eviction_exceeded_time
  + eventloop_cycles
  + eventloop_duration_sum
  + eventloop_duration_cmd_sum
  + instantaneous_eventloop_cycles_per_sec
  + instantaneous_eventloop_duration_usec
  + acl_access_denied_auth
  + acl_access_denied_cmd
  + acl_access_denied_key
  + acl_access_denied_channel

All emit '0' since fr does not yet track those counters; tools
that grep on field names (redis_exporter etc.) get the upstream
shape and zero-valued counters they expect.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
